hibernate-mapping.sql-query:
--Declare variables DECLARE @CreatedBySeq VARCHAR(MAX) DECLARE @FacilityCSV VARCHAR(MAX) DECLARE @Name VARCHAR(MAX) DECLARE @FullName VARCHAR(MAX) DECLARE @FacilityCode VARCHAR(MAX) DECLARE @ListOfFacilities VARCHAR(MAX)
--Temporary table declaration DECLARE @tmpUserAccessFacility TABLE ( Name VARCHAR(MAX), FullName VARCHAR(MAX), Facility VARCHAR(MAX), AccessFacility VARCHAR(MAX));
--Cursor implementation to insert the values(The facility column has the CSV...) into the temporary table. DECLARE RequestCursor CURSOR LOCAL FOR SELECT DISTINCT Created_By_Seq FROM [ROI_RequestMain]
OPEN RequestCursor FETCH NEXT FROM RequestCursor INTO @CreatedBySeq WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 BEGIN SET @FacilityCSV = ''
SELECT @Name = NAME, @FullName = FullName FROM [USERS] WHERE UserInstanceId = @CreatedBySeq
SELECT @FacilityCSV = LTRIM(RTRIM(FACILITY)) + ',' + @FacilityCSV FROM User_Facility WHERE USER_ID = @CreatedBySeq
INSERT INTO @tmpUserAccessFacility VALUES(@Name, @FullName, ',' + @FacilityCSV, '');
FETCH NEXT FROM RequestCursor INTO @CreatedBySeq END
--Cursor implementation to update the AccessFacility column of temporary table as per the facility code in the ROI_SalesTaxPerFacility table. DECLARE FacilityCursor CURSOR LOCAL FOR SELECT Facility_Code FROM ROI_SalesTaxPerFacility
OPEN FacilityCursor FETCH NEXT FROM FacilityCursor INTO @FacilityCode WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 BEGIN
UPDATE @tmpUserAccessFacility SET AccessFacility = AccessFacility + ','+ LTRIM(RTRIM(@FacilityCode)) WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(Facility)) like '%' + ','+LTRIM(RTRIM(@FacilityCode))+',' + '%'
FETCH NEXT FROM FacilityCursor INTO @FacilityCode END
--Insert the facility code from the table ROI_SalesTaxPerFacility into temporary table when the access facility column is empty. SET @ListOfFacilities = '' SELECT @ListOfFacilities = @ListOfFacilities + ','+ LTRIM(RTRIM(Facility_Code)) FROM [ROI_SalesTaxPerFacility]
UPDATE @tmpUserAccessFacility SET AccessFacility = @ListOfFacilities WHERE AccessFacility = NULL or AccessFacility = ''
--Remove the unwanted first character ',' in each column UPDATE @tmpUserAccessFacility SET AccessFacility = STUFF(AccessFacility, 1, 1, '')
--Close and deallocate cursors created CLOSE RequestCursor CLOSE FacilityCursor DEALLOCATE RequestCursor DEALLOCATE FacilityCursor
--Display the temporary table SELECT CAST(FullName AS VARCHAR(30)) as fullName, CAST(Name AS VARCHAR(20)) as name, CAST(AccessFacility AS VARCHAR(256)) as accessFacility FROM @tmpUserAccessFacility WHERE Name != NULL OR Name != ''
select RTRIM(FACILITY_CODE) as facilityCode, RTRIM(FACILITY_NAME) as facilityName from [FACILITY_FILE] where FACILITY_CODE IN (:facilityCodes)
